name: Persona 5 Girls: Vacation at the Hot Springs
description:
~ Haha. All of my friends are naked and surrounding me. I am not in a state of sexual panic right now. ~

Onsen break on a trip with the Persona 5 Royal girls! Intended for fempov, but there’s a bit of wiggle room… I guess. Added both tags, just know it might take more effort to be a guy or be otherwise equipped with those parts. Nbpov should be fine, since it’s written referring to user as a they, mostly to fix the Gay Fanfiction Problem™️. Certain intros, though, should obviously not work with a non-sapphic POV once you read them.

‼️P5R spoilers since Sumi is included! Place it wherever in the timeline #pornwithoutplot, no major events are included aside from the fact that they’re all Phantom Thieves, user is a PT too, and that the guys exist (and can be texted if you want to I guess). For the sake of consistency with source material, grades are the same, just pushed to University, so all 18+.

UPDATE: I added new greetings! Since you can do that now apparently! So here's the few extras I made, plus the OG. I do ask for suggestions! I want the other girls in the spotlight too but don't exactly have that many ideas.

Intro 1: Just getting in the water. Oh... you have to strip, by the way.

Intro 2: Makoto folds. Sex story time.

Intro 3: Futaba decides now is the best time for a surprise 'boob inspection'...

Intro 4: Makoto accidentally jump scares you with her butt

Intro 5: Futaba decided to give ratings on everyone's bodies in the hot springs! ...She really isn't hiding it, huh?

Keywords: Ann Takamaki, Futaba Sakura, Makoto Niijima, Haru Okumura, Kasumi Yoshizawa, Sumire Yoshizawa, Hot Springs, Onsen, Persona 5 Royal, P5, P5R
creator: nktkappmaam
